javascript:(() => { "use strict"; const NS = "dk-threaded-bookmarklet"; const STYLE_ID = `${NS}-style`; const ROOT_ID = `${NS}-root`; const STATE_KEY = "__DK_THREADED_COMMENTS_STATE__"; const MAX_PAGES = 50; const PAGE_LIMIT = 100; const REPLY_LIMIT = 100; const NAME_LOOKUP_CONCURRENCY = 8; function byTimeAsc(a, b) { const at = Number(a.time || a.date_created || 0); const bt = Number(b.time || b.date_created || 0); if (at !== bt) return at - bt; return String(a.content_uuid || "").localeCompare(String(b.content_uuid || "")); } function ensureStyle() { if (document.getElementById(STYLE_ID)) return; const style = document.createElement("style"); style.id = STYLE_ID; style.textContent = ` #${ROOT_ID} { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.4; color: #1f2937; border: 1px solid #d1d5db; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; margin-top: 1rem; } #${ROOT_ID} .${NS}__toolbar { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 2; background: #f8fafc; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e7eb; padding: 0.75rem; display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } #${ROOT_ID} .${NS}__toolbar-left { font-weight: 600; } #${ROOT_ID} .${NS}__toolbar-right { display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; } #${ROOT_ID} .${NS}__btn { appearance: none; border: 1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius: 6px; background: #ffffff; color: #111827; padding: 0.35rem 0.6rem; cursor: pointer; font-size: 12px; } #${ROOT_ID} .${NS}__btn:hover { background: #f3f4f6; } #${ROOT_ID} .${NS}__body { padding: 0.75rem; } #${ROOT_ID} .${NS}__status { padding: 0.75rem; color: #334155; } #${ROOT_ID} .${NS}__error { background: #fef2f2; border: 1px solid #fecaca; color: #991b1b; border-radius: 6px; padding: 0.75rem; } #${ROOT_ID} .${NS}__comment { border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 6px; padding: 0.6rem; background: #fff; } #${ROOT_ID} .${NS}__comment + .${NS}__comment { margin-top: 0.5rem; } #${ROOT_ID} .${NS}__meta { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.5rem; color: #475569; font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: 0.35rem; } #${ROOT_ID} .${NS}__author { font-weight: 600; color: #111827; } #${ROOT_ID} .${NS}__content { white-space: pre-wrap; word-break: break-word; } #${ROOT_ID} .${NS}__counts { margin-top: 0.4rem; color: #64748b; font-size: 12px; } #${ROOT_ID} .${NS}__children { margin-top: 0.6rem; padding-left: 0.8rem; border-left: 2px solid #e2e8f0; } #${ROOT_ID} .${NS}__collapsed { display: none; } #${ROOT_ID} .${NS}__orphans { margin-top: 1rem; padding-top: 0.8rem; border-top: 1px dashed #cbd5e1; } #${ROOT_ID} .${NS}__orphan-title { font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } `; document.head.appendChild(style); } function getContainerId(target) { const bodyValue = document.body && document.body.getAttribute("vf-container-id"); if (bodyValue) return bodyValue; const vfConversations = target.querySelector("vf-conversations[vf-container-id]"); if (vfConversations) { const id = vfConversations.getAttribute("vf-container-id"); if (id) return id; } return ""; } function cleanUrl(url) { return url.replace(/([^:]\/)\/+/g, "$1"); } async function fetchJson(url, options = {}, timeoutMs = 20000) { const controller = new AbortController(); const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), timeoutMs); try { const response = await fetch(url, { ...options, signal: controller.signal, credentials: "include" }); const text = await response.text(); if (!response.ok) { throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}: ${text.slice(0, 300)}`); } let data; try { data = JSON.parse(text); } catch (err) { throw new Error(`Non-JSON response from ${url}: ${text.slice(0, 300)}`); } if (typeof data === "string") { throw new Error(`API error from ${url}: ${data}`); } return data; } finally { clearTimeout(timeout); } } function createRoot(target) { const existing = document.getElementById(ROOT_ID); if (existing) existing.remove(); const root = document.createElement("div"); root.id = ROOT_ID; root.innerHTML = ` <div class="${NS}__toolbar"> <div class="${NS}__toolbar-left">Threaded comments</div> <div class="${NS}__toolbar-right"></div> </div> <div class="${NS}__body"> <div class="${NS}__status">Loading comments...</div> </div> `; target.appendChild(root); return root; } function renderToolbar(root, summaryText, onRefresh, onRestore) { const left = root.querySelector(`.${NS}__toolbar-left`); left.textContent = summaryText; const right = root.querySelector(`.${NS}__toolbar-right`); right.innerHTML = ""; const refresh = document.createElement("button"); refresh.className = `${NS}__btn`; refresh.type = "button"; refresh.textContent = "Refresh from API"; refresh.addEventListener("click", onRefresh); const restore = document.createElement("button"); restore.className = `${NS}__btn`; restore.type = "button"; restore.textContent = "Restore Viafoura"; restore.addEventListener("click", onRestore); right.appendChild(refresh); right.appendChild(restore); } function formatTimestamp(ms) { if (!ms) return "Unknown time"; const d = new Date(Number(ms)); if (Number.isNaN(d.getTime())) return "Unknown time"; return d.toLocaleString(); } function uuidToNumericId(uuid) { if (!uuid || typeof uuid !== "string") return null; if (uuid === "00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000000000") return 0; if (!/^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-4000-800[0-9a-f]-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(uuid)) return null; const hex = uuid[22] + uuid.slice(24); const numeric = parseInt(hex, 16); if (Number.isNaN(numeric)) return null; return numeric; } async function mapLimit(items, limit, mapper) { const out = new Array(items.length); let index = 0; async function worker() { while (index < items.length) { const current = index; index += 1; out[current] = await mapper(items[current], current); } } const workers = Array.from({ length: Math.min(limit, items.length) }, () => worker()); await Promise.all(workers); return out; } async function resolveActorNames(hostname, comments) { const actorUuids = Array.from( new Set( comments .map((c) => c && c.actor_uuid) .filter((id) => typeof id === "string" && id.length > 0) ) ); const nameByActor = new Map(); if (!actorUuids.length) return nameByActor; const host = encodeURIComponent(hostname); await mapLimit(actorUuids, NAME_LOOKUP_CONCURRENCY, async (actorUuid) => { const id = uuidToNumericId(actorUuid); if (id === null) { nameByActor.set(actorUuid, actorUuid); return; } const url = `https://api.viafoura.co/v2/${host}/users/${id}`; try { const data = await fetchJson(url); const result = data && data.result ? data.result : data; const name = result && typeof result.name === "string" ? result.name.trim() : ""; nameByActor.set(actorUuid, name || actorUuid); } catch (_) { nameByActor.set(actorUuid, actorUuid); } }); return nameByActor; } function renderError(root, message, onRetry) { const body = root.querySelector(`.${NS}__body`); body.innerHTML = ""; const box = document.createElement("div"); box.className = `${NS}__error`; const msg = document.createElement("div"); msg.textContent = message; const retry = document.createElement("button"); retry.className = `${NS}__btn`; retry.type = "button"; retry.style.marginTop = "0.6rem"; retry.textContent = "Retry"; retry.addEventListener("click", onRetry); box.appendChild(msg); box.appendChild(retry); body.appendChild(box); } function renderCommentNode(comment, childrenByParent, nameByActor) { const wrapper = document.createElement("div"); wrapper.className = `${NS}__comment`; const meta = document.createElement("div"); meta.className = `${NS}__meta`; const author = document.createElement("span"); author.className = `${NS}__author`; const actorUuid = comment.actor_uuid || ""; author.textContent = (actorUuid && nameByActor.get(actorUuid)) || actorUuid || "unknown-user"; const when = document.createElement("span"); when.textContent = formatTimestamp(comment.time || comment.date_created); meta.appendChild(author); meta.appendChild(when); const content = document.createElement("div"); content.className = `${NS}__content`; content.textContent = comment.content || ""; const counts = document.createElement("div"); counts.className = `${NS}__counts`; counts.textContent = `${comment.total_likes || 0} likes | ${comment.total_replies || 0} replies`; wrapper.appendChild(meta); wrapper.appendChild(content); wrapper.appendChild(counts); const kids = (childrenByParent.get(comment.content_uuid) || []).slice().sort(byTimeAsc); if (kids.length > 0) { const toggle = document.createElement("button"); toggle.className = `${NS}__btn`; toggle.type = "button"; toggle.style.marginTop = "0.5rem"; toggle.textContent = `Collapse branch (${kids.length})`; const childrenWrap = document.createElement("div"); childrenWrap.className = `${NS}__children`; toggle.addEventListener("click", () => { const collapsed = childrenWrap.classList.toggle(`${NS}__collapsed`); toggle.textContent = collapsed ? `Expand branch (${kids.length})` : `Collapse branch (${kids.length})`; }); for (const child of kids) { childrenWrap.appendChild(renderCommentNode(child, childrenByParent, nameByActor)); } wrapper.appendChild(toggle); wrapper.appendChild(childrenWrap); } return wrapper; } function renderComments(root, comments, containerUuid, totalVisibleContent, nameByActor) { const body = root.querySelector(`.${NS}__body`); body.innerHTML = ""; const childrenByParent = new Map(); for (const c of comments) { if (!c || !c.content_uuid) continue; if (!childrenByParent.has(c.parent_uuid)) childrenByParent.set(c.parent_uuid, []); childrenByParent.get(c.parent_uuid).push(c); } for (const list of childrenByParent.values()) { list.sort(byTimeAsc); } const topLevel = (childrenByParent.get(containerUuid) || []).slice().sort(byTimeAsc); const reachable = new Set(); (function visit(nodes) { for (const node of nodes) { if (!node || reachable.has(node.content_uuid)) continue; reachable.add(node.content_uuid); const kids = childrenByParent.get(node.content_uuid) || []; visit(kids); } })(topLevel); const orphans = comments.filter((c) => c && c.content_uuid && !reachable.has(c.content_uuid)).sort(byTimeAsc); for (const top of topLevel) { body.appendChild(renderCommentNode(top, childrenByParent, nameByActor)); } if (orphans.length) { const section = document.createElement("div"); section.className = `${NS}__orphans`; const title = document.createElement("div"); title.className = `${NS}__orphan-title`; title.textContent = `Orphaned comments (${orphans.length})`; section.appendChild(title); for (const orphan of orphans) { section.appendChild(renderCommentNode(orphan, childrenByParent, nameByActor)); } body.appendChild(section); } return { totalLoaded: comments.length, topLevelCount: topLevel.length, expectedVisible: Number(totalVisibleContent || 0) }; } function hideOriginalContent(target, root) { const state = window[STATE_KEY]; const children = Array.from(target.children).filter((el) => el !== root); for (const el of children) { state.hiddenNodes.push({ el, display: el.style.display, ariaHidden: el.getAttribute("aria-hidden") }); el.style.display = "none"; el.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "true"); } } function restoreOriginalContent() { const state = window[STATE_KEY]; if (!state) return; for (const item of state.hiddenNodes) { if (!item.el) continue; item.el.style.display = item.display || ""; if (item.ariaHidden === null || item.ariaHidden === undefined) { item.el.removeAttribute("aria-hidden"); } else { item.el.setAttribute("aria-hidden", item.ariaHidden); } } state.hiddenNodes = []; } function cleanup() { const state = window[STATE_KEY]; if (!state) return; restoreOriginalContent(); const root = document.getElementById(ROOT_ID); if (root) root.remove(); state.active = false; delete window[STATE_KEY]; } async function resolveSectionUuid(hostname) { const bootstrapUrl = `https://api.viafoura.co/v2/${hostname}/bootstrap/v2?session=false`; const data = await fetchJson(bootstrapUrl, { method: "POST", headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }, body: JSON.stringify({ section: "", section_tree: "", session: "false" }) }); const sectionUuid = data && data.result && data.result.settings && data.result.settings.site_uuid; if (!sectionUuid) { throw new Error("Unable to resolve Viafoura section UUID from bootstrap response."); } return sectionUuid; } async function resolveContentContainerUuid(sectionUuid, vfContainerId) { const lookup = cleanUrl( `https://livecomments.viafoura.co/v4/livecomments/${sectionUuid}/contentcontainer/id?container_id=${encodeURIComponent(vfContainerId)}` ); const data = await fetchJson(lookup); const containerUuid = data && data.content_container_uuid; if (!containerUuid) { throw new Error("Container lookup failed: no content_container_uuid returned."); } return { contentContainerUuid: containerUuid, totalVisibleContent: data.total_visible_content || 0 }; } async function fetchAllComments(sectionUuid, containerUuid) { const seen = new Map(); let startingFrom = ""; for (let page = 1; page <= MAX_PAGES; page += 1) { const params = new URLSearchParams(); params.set("limit", String(PAGE_LIMIT)); params.set("reply_limit", String(REPLY_LIMIT)); params.set("sorted_by", "oldest"); if (startingFrom) params.set("starting_from", startingFrom); const url = cleanUrl( `https://livecomments.viafoura.co/v4/livecomments/${sectionUuid}/${containerUuid}/comments?${params.toString()}` ); const data = await fetchJson(url); const contents = Array.isArray(data.contents) ? data.contents : []; for (const c of contents) { if (c && c.content_uuid && !seen.has(c.content_uuid)) { seen.set(c.content_uuid, c); } } if (!data.more_available) { break; } const topLevel = contents.filter((c) => c && c.parent_uuid === containerUuid).sort(byTimeAsc); const nextCursor = topLevel.length ? topLevel[0].content_uuid : ""; if (!nextCursor || nextCursor === startingFrom) { break; } startingFrom = nextCursor; } return Array.from(seen.values()); } async function mountThreadedView() { if (window[STATE_KEY] && window[STATE_KEY].active) { cleanup(); return; } if (location.hostname !== "beta.dailykos.com" || !location.pathname.includes("/stories/")) { throw new Error("This bookmarklet only runs on Daily Kos beta story pages."); } const target = document.getElementById("dk-comments"); if (!target) { throw new Error("Could not find #dk-comments on this page."); } const vfContainerId = getContainerId(target); if (!vfContainerId) { throw new Error("Missing vf-container-id on body or #dk-comments vf-conversations."); } ensureStyle(); window[STATE_KEY] = { active: true, hiddenNodes: [], loading: false }; const root = createRoot(target); hideOriginalContent(target, root); const runLoad = async () => { const state = window[STATE_KEY]; if (!state || state.loading) return; state.loading = true; const body = root.querySelector(`.${NS}__body`); body.innerHTML = `<div class="${NS}__status">Loading comments from Viafoura...</div>`; try { const sectionUuid = await resolveSectionUuid(location.hostname); const lookup = await resolveContentContainerUuid(sectionUuid, vfContainerId); const comments = await fetchAllComments(sectionUuid, lookup.contentContainerUuid); const nameByActor = await resolveActorNames(location.hostname, comments); const summary = renderComments( root, comments, lookup.contentContainerUuid, lookup.totalVisibleContent, nameByActor ); const expected = summary.expectedVisible ? ` | visible: ${summary.expectedVisible}` : ""; renderToolbar( root, `Threaded comments: ${summary.totalLoaded} loaded | top-level: ${summary.topLevelCount}${expected}`, runLoad, cleanup ); } catch (err) { renderToolbar(root, "Threaded comments: error", runLoad, cleanup); renderError(root, err && err.message ? err.message : "Unknown error while loading comments.", runLoad); } finally { const currentState = window[STATE_KEY]; if (currentState) currentState.loading = false; } }; renderToolbar(root, "Threaded comments: loading...", runLoad, cleanup); await runLoad(); } mountThreadedView().catch((err) => { const msg = err && err.message ? err.message : String(err); console.error(`${NS}:`, msg); alert(`Daily Kos threaded bookmarklet error: ${msg}`); cleanup(); }); })();
